description: Stage-1 BeatDetector baseline. Phase 1 = RECORD ONLY; thresholds become hard assertions in Stage 2.

fixtures.label: clicktrack_50bpm
fixtures.formatted:
--- clicktrack_50bpm ---
  Duration       : 15.0s
  True BPM (mid) : 50.0
  BPM error      : mean=0.22 max=0.22 signed=0.22 (0.45%) [n=253]
  Beat offset    : mean=5.3ms p90=5.3ms median=5.3ms [5 matched]
  Beats          : emitted=6 GT=12 matched=5 FP=1 (4.0/min) miss=7 recall=41.7%
  Lock time      : 1.54s
  Confidence     : correct=0.133 wrong=0.000 r=0.000 [n=253]
  Octave error   : none
  Detection rate : 90.0% of state messages have tempo > 0
  Result         : FAIL (low recall 41.7% (< 50%))

fixtures.label: clicktrack_120bpm
fixtures.formatted:
--- clicktrack_120bpm ---
  Duration       : 15.0s
  True BPM (mid) : 120.0
  BPM error      : mean=60.16 max=60.16 signed=-60.16 (-50.13%) [n=253]
  Beat offset    : mean=6.7ms p90=9.3ms median=9.3ms [6 matched]
  Beats          : emitted=7 GT=30 matched=6 FP=1 (4.0/min) miss=24 recall=20.0%
  Lock time      : NEVER
  Confidence     : correct=0.000 wrong=0.277 r=0.000 [n=253]
  Octave error   : HALF-OCTAVE (locked at 0.5x)
  Detection rate : 90.0% of state messages have tempo > 0
  Result         : FAIL (BPM error > 5% (mean=60.2 BPM); low recall 20.0% (< 50%); never locked to correct tempo; octave error: HALF-OCTAVE (locked at 0.5x))
